$comment: Reasons for every non-glob entry in knip.json#ignore.
validate:knip-ignores fails when an ignore entry has no reason here.
This file is the documented trail for 'why is this orphan allowed?'.
Keep entries one-line and substantive — 'TODO' / 'placeholder' / 'needed' do not pass.

files.src/contracts/**: Generated from content-schema/schemas/. Source of truth is the schema; the .ts is mechanically derived by scripts/generate-contracts-from-schemas.mjs and consumed via type imports.
files.src/content-schema/migrations/example-*: Reference template for the per-version migration shape. Lives in-tree so future migrations can be cargo-culted from it.
files.services/shared/log-channels.ts: Foundational logger primitives. Consumer is the services-runtime task that wires them into the gateway.
files.services/shared/logger.ts: Foundational logger primitives. Consumer is the services-runtime task that wires them into the gateway.
files.services/shared/redact.ts: Foundational PII-redaction helper. Consumer is the services-runtime task; required by docs/operations/services-runtime-rules.md.
files.services/turn/scripts/sync-deny-list.ts: Operational script for the TURN deny-list sync; runs out-of-band, not imported by the runtime graph.
files.src/content-runtime/manifest-digest.ts: Pack-manifest hashing primitive. Consumer is the pack-resolver task.
files.src/engine/constants.ts: Engine-wide deterministic constants. Consumers are the engine systems landing in the engine-core MVP cluster.
Verification anchor for signed official packs. Consumer is the pack-signing task in phase-2.
files.src/net/lockstep/turn-timer.ts: Deterministic turn-timer primitive. Consumer is the lockstep task in the multiplayer cluster.
files.src/shared/assert.ts: Repo-wide invariant guard. Consumers are every engine/rules/contracts module that needs fail-loud asserts.
files.src/ui/sanitize.ts: Untrusted-string ingest filter. Consumer is the schema-validation boundary task; required by docs/architecture/untrusted-strings.md.

dependencies.@stryker-mutator/typescript-checker: Stryker plugin loaded by stryker.conf.mjs at runtime, not via a static import knip can trace.
dependencies.@stryker-mutator/vitest-runner: Stryker plugin loaded by stryker.conf.mjs at runtime, not via a static import knip can trace.
dependencies.@stryker-mutator/api: Imported only as a JSDoc type in stryker.conf.mjs (`@type`), which knip does not parse.
dependencies.@vitest/coverage-v8: Vitest coverage provider loaded by vitest.config.ts via string name, not a static import.
dependencies.globals: Used inside eslint.config.mjs to spread browser/node global sets into the parser config.
dependencies.jscpd: Invoked via `npx jscpd` from scripts/validate-duplication.mjs; not statically imported.
dependencies.knip: Invoked via `npx knip` from scripts/validate-dead-code.mjs; not statically imported.

binaries.stryker: CLI invoked by `stryker run` from the test:mutation* npm scripts; provided by @stryker-mutator/core.
